title: Thaumcraft NEI Plugin : Patched
description: A addon with bug-patches for the popular 1.7.10 mod Thaumcraft NEI Plugin, made by Jan2048.
body:
# A Thaumcraft NEI Plugin addon

This mod is an addon for the popular mod **Thaumcraft NEI Plugin**, originaly made by Jan2048 back in the day.
The mod author doesn't answer private messages for months and is not supporting his mod since more than a decade, so I decided to make an addon to patch some of the annoying bugs that are remaining in there.
Source code is public, you can notice I didn't copy anything from the original mod : the licence is respected.

If you notice something odd or want a new feature, feel free to ask !

/!\ This mod needs multiple mods to be able to run /!\

> [CodeChickenCore](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/codechickencore), [NotEnoughItems](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/notenoughitems), [Thaumcraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thaumcraft), [Thaumcraft NEI Plugin](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thaumcraft-nei-plugin), [NemexLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/nemexlib)

## Patched bugs :
- **Infusion**, **Crucible** and both **Shaped** & **Shapeless Arcane** used to have issues not showing all recipes in the original mod. This was caused by the mod comparing the `stackSize` from the item clicked and all recipes.
  - For example, Crucible recipe for Thauminite [Thaumic Bases] yields 8 nuggets. If you clicked the Thauminite nugget in NotEnoughItems menu, it would show you no recipe, as the item you click in NEI only got a `stackSize` of 1, and the output of that recipe got a `stackSize` of 8.

## New features :
- Infusion is now compatible with checking ItemStack with infamous metadata `32767`
- Refactored part of the code with modern syntax

## Planned additions :
- Compatibility with Mystical Construct recipes (from all **Thaumcraft** addons)
- Compatibility with Polished Infusion and Void Permeation recipes (from **Thaumic Concilium**)

# End of Modrinth support !
- The newest versions of the mod will only be available on [**CurseForge**](https://www.curseforge.com/members/thenemex/projects)
- These mods are essentially made for my modpack [**Thaumic Industries 2 - Expert**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/thaumic-industries-2-expert), but I try my best to bring new features and config tweaks for everyone to enjoy !
